task: Implement the remaining tasks (Task 4 to Task 8) in 'openspec/onboarding-marketing-overhaul.tasks.md' for the change 'onboarding-marketing-overhaul'. Note that Task 1, 2, and 3 are already implemented in the files 'lib/onboarding-i18n.ts', 'components/onboarding/OnboardingTour.tsx', and 'components/layout/Sidebar.tsx' respectively. Run 'npm run test:run' and 'npx tsc --noEmit' to verify.
